title: TCS Nashik case: Accused set to move court for bail, says waiting for FIR copy
description: The accused in the TCS Nashik BPO sexual harassment and religious coercion case are in the process of moving a Nashik court for bail and anticipatory bail.Lawyers Baba Sayyed and Rahul Kasliwal, representing some of the accused, said they are preparing anticipatory bail application for accused Nida Khan (who is yet to be arrested) and regular bail applications for others who were arrested and are in judicial custody. Nida Khan, initially described as an HR head and later as a sales telecaller, i
